614 X0600F_CRCTN_ENTRY_DSCHRG_CD X0600F_CRCTN_ENTRY_DSCHRG_CD X0600F Correction Entry/Discharge Code CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the Entry/Discharge Reporting (A0310F) code from the prior erroneous record to be modified or inactivated. 01=Entry tracking record
10=Discharge assessment - return not
